mainReadinessStatus: not_ready_for_public_launch; local orchestration-core proof can pass after this branch merges, but durable/external/deployment proof remains blocked

P0.summary: Supabase durable queue/repository restart-resume proof is still not proven from this environment.
P0.remediation: Run the full proof with real SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in durable mode, then capture restart/resume evidence.

P0.summary: External executor/API-key backed build path remains unproven by the local orchestration-core proof.
P0.remediation: Run the full build-path proof with a real executor credential and confirm generated output is produced by the intended executor path.

P0.summary: Do not claim public launch readiness until proof passes from main with durable storage, auth, executor, and deployment gates proven.
P0.remediation: Merge proof/orchestration branch, rerun all required gates on main, and update claim boundaries only after green main evidence exists.

P1.summary: Protected commercial route proof with configured auth is not proven locally.
P1.remediation: Use metadata-only secret references and real local/CI auth configuration to prove protected route behavior without hardcoding secrets.

P1.summary: Production/preview deployment smoke proof remains outside this local orchestration-core proof.
P1.remediation: Run credential-gated deployment dry-run or approved preview deployment proof and record rollback/smoke evidence.

branchMerge.summary: The branch now contains the missing proof:orchestration-core script, worker/wave regression test, memory queue core, and proof artifacts.
Reported commit fea564272060ec54e40d2935df3eb6a2f8be0933 is not present in the local object database, so the changes were recreated minimally instead of cherry-picked.

proof.summary: Local in-memory worker/wave proof passes with score 100.
Main cannot truthfully claim this proof until the PR is merged and proof:orchestration-core passes on main.

deployment.summary: Live deployment execution requires approved credentials and must remain blocked-by-default without them.

securitySecrets.summary: No secrets were added; proof records credential gaps as blockers.

claimMarketing.summary: Allowed claim after this PR: local orchestration-core worker/wave proof exists and passes. Disallowed claim: public launch ready.

cleanupOnly.summary: Repo now writes both botomatic-full-build-proof.json and BOTOMATIC_FULL_BUILD_PROOF.json for compatibility; future cleanup may standardize naming after downstream references are checked.

nextRemediationOrder: Merge this proof/orchestration-worker-wave branch into main.
On main, run npm run build, npm run test, npm run validate:all, and npm run proof:orchestration-core.
Provision approved durable Supabase proof credentials and rerun durable queue/restart-resume proof.
Provision approved external executor/auth proof credentials without hardcoding secrets and rerun protected build path proof.
Run credential-gated deployment dry-run/preview proof and smoke/rollback evidence.
Only after all main proof gates pass, update marketing/launch claims.
